heading: Army Reserve Forces Policy Committee
label: 7021 Army Reserve Forces Policy Committee
text: There is in the Office of the Secretary of the Army an Army Reserve Forces Policy Committee. The functions, membership, and organization of that committee are set forth in .section 10302 of this title
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 3021 of this title
